# link11waap_rate_limit_rules (Data Source)

Lists all rate limit rules in a configuration.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Example: Rate Limit Rules Data Source

data "link11waap_config" "main" {}

data "link11waap_rate_limit_rules" "all" {
  config_id = data.link11waap_config.main.id
}

output "rate_limit_rules" {
  value = data.link11waap_rate_limit_rules.all.rate_limit_rules
}

output "rate_limit_rule_names" {
  value = [for rl in data.link11waap_rate_limit_rules.all.rate_limit_rules : rl.name]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `config_id` (String) Configuration ID.

### Read-Only

- `rate_limit_rules` (Attributes List) List of rate limit rules. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--rate_limit_rules))

Read-Only:

- `id` (String)
- `include` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--rate_limit_rules--include))
- `name` (String)
- `tags` (List of String)
- `threshold` (Number)
- `timeframe` (Number)
- `ttl` (Number)
